title: Aadi Krithigai
text:
Celebrate Aadfi Krithigai with us on August 6th & 7th. Main Utsavam on Tursday, August 7th
Aadi Bharani Nakshatra: Begins on Wednesday, August 5 at 9:18 PM and ends on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM.
Aadi Krithigai Nakshatra: Begins on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM and ends on Friday, August 7 at 6:43 PM.

Krittika Nakshatra enters on the evening of Thursday, August 6th, it remains active through sunrise (Udaya Nakshatra) and prevails for almost the entire day of Friday, August 7th.
